reason: Check that implementation and evidence respect global RVV-first authority and Python/tooling boundaries.
Check selected-boundary runtime scalar dual compare mask/select facts, provider-owned route construction, target artifact mirrors, and direct shortcut fail-closed behavior.
Check that runtime ABI roles stay envelope declarations and do not become compute authority.
Check common EmitC remains a neutral consumer of provider-built routes.
Check generated-bundle evidence derives compare/select and mask composition facts from provider-derived typed facts and records real runtime evidence for executable claims.
